page: Amazon Web Services m8in.metal-96xl is a bare-metal, general-purpose server instance powered by Intel processors. It features an x86_64 architecture with 192 physical cores and 384 vCPUs via hyperthreading, operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The system is equipped with 1536.0 GB of dedicated system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This instance does not include local NVMe storage, requiring reliance on external Amazon Elastic Block Store (EBS) volumes for storage needs. To support high-throughput storage and network traffic, the instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 300 Gbps. It does not feature integrated GPU hardware, making it unsuitable for workloads requiring hardware-accelerated graphics or parallel computing.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the bare-metal deployment model eliminates virtualization overhead, providing direct access to the underlying hardware resources. This resource density is structured for large-scale enterprise applications, distributed databases, memory-intensive general-purpose workloads, and high-throughput network appliances that require substantial network bandwidth and dedicated CPU allocation.
description: Amazon Web Services m8in.metal-96xl is a bare-metal general-purpose server utilizing Intel x86_64 processors. It delivers 384 vCPUs across 192 physical cores running at 3.9 GHz, paired with 1536.0 GB of dedicated RAM. This configuration maintains a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per vCPU. The instance lacks local storage and integrated GPUs, meaning all storage operations must utilize network-attached volumes. To mitigate this, the server features a high baseline network bandwidth of 300 Gbps, optimizing it for network-heavy operations and EBS-backed storage configurations. The bare-metal architecture eliminates virtualization overhead, offering direct hardware access for resource-intensive deployments. This server is designed for enterprise applications, large-scale web serving, and distributed database workloads requiring high network throughput and dedicated compute resources.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m8in.metal-96xl is a bare-metal server featuring 384 vCPUs, 1536 GB RAM, and 300 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-throughput general-purpose enterprise workloads.

tagline: A bare-metal general-purpose instance featuring three hundred eighty-four vCPUs, massive system memory, and high-speed network bandwidth.
